016package org.consensusj.analytics.service;
017
018import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Single;
019import org.reactivestreams.Publisher;
020
021/**
022 * Interface for reactive rich list service
023 *
024 * @param <N> Numeric type for balances
025 * @param <ID> Type for currency identifiers (e.g. String, Omni Currency ID, etc)
026 */
027public interface RichListService<N extends Number & Comparable<? super N>, ID> {
028
029    // TODO: Convert Single to CompletableFuture
030    /**
031     * Return a single rich list
032     *
033     * @param currencyID The currency ID
034     * @param numEntries The requested number of entries in the list
035     * @return An RxJava Single for lazy access to the response
036     */
037    Single<TokenRichList<N, ID>> richList(ID currencyID, int numEntries);
038
039    /**
040     * Get a continuous stream of rich list updates
041     *
042     * @param currencyID The currency ID
043     * @param numEntries The requested number of entries in each list
044     * @return A Publisher for lazy access to the stream
045     */
046    Publisher<TokenRichList<N, ID>> richListUpdates(ID currencyID, int numEntries);
047}
